title: Friendly Chests
description: Lets chests stop social distancing! (can be placed closer together)
body:
## Backports the feature from 1.13 that lets chests stop social distancing!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aF68aCuT/images/a1d5024c0ef337d545d9f7fa389c55ed164274d6.png)

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/curseforge_46h.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/friendly-chests) [![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/modrinth_46h.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/friendly-chests)

If you're a modpack developer wanting to add Friendly Chests to a modpack distributed outside of CurseForge or Modrinth, use [File Director](https://modrinth.com/mod/filedirector) to avoid reuploading Friendly Chests's files.

---

Supports all properly coded chests, and does not add any new blocks! If you find any conflicts or bugs please let me know c:

Can be safely added to any existing world, but always make a backup just to be safe! **Removing this mod from existing worlds is likely to break stuff though.**

---

##### Direct contact: [jbred.dev@gmail.com](mailto:jbred.dev@gmail.com)
##### This mod will not be ported, but might be backported to 1.7.10 in the future.
